creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
I re-tested this with a blank /etc/make.conf, and fresh 'portsnap fetch
update' and went against INDEX-8 and INDEX-7. They appear to be similar
results.

#!/bin/sh
#
# This is an executable shell script created by the
# portcheckout program:
#
#	 /usr/local/bin/portcheckout --index=/usr/ports/INDEX-7 apache-2.2.17_1

cd /usr/ports/www/apache22 || exit 1
PORTSDIR="/usr/ports/www/apache22/ports"; export PORTSDIR

# checkout FreeBSD ports system Makefiles
cvs checkout -P  ports/Mk
cvs checkout -P  ports/Templates

##################################################
# checkout port: apache-2.2.17_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/www/apache22

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: apr-ipv6-devrandom-gdbm-db42-1.4.2.1.3.10
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/apr1

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: autoconf-2.68
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/autoconf

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: autoconf-wrapper-20101119
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/autoconf-wrapper

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: db42-4.2.52_5
cvs checkout -P  ports/databases/db42

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: expat-2.0.1_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/textproc/expat2

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: gdbm-1.8.3_3
cvs checkout -P  ports/databases/gdbm

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: libiconv-1.13.1_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/converters/libiconv

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: libtool-2.2.10
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/libtool

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: m4-1.4.15,1
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/m4

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: pcre-8.11
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/pcre

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: perl-5.10.1_3
cvs checkout -P  ports/lang/perl5.10

##################################################
# Compile and install apache-2.2.17_1
( cd ports/www/apache22 && make all install clean )

#!/bin/sh
#
# This is an executable shell script created by the
# portcheckout program:
#
#	 /usr/local/bin/portcheckout --index=/usr/ports/INDEX-8 apache-2.2.17_1

cd /usr/ports/www/apache22 || exit 1
PORTSDIR="/usr/ports/www/apache22/ports"; export PORTSDIR

# checkout FreeBSD ports system Makefiles
cvs checkout -P  ports/Mk
cvs checkout -P  ports/Templates

##################################################
# checkout port: apache-2.2.17_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/www/apache22

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: apr-ipv6-devrandom-gdbm-db42-1.4.2.1.3.10
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/apr1

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: autoconf-2.68
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/autoconf

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: autoconf-wrapper-20101119
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/autoconf-wrapper

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: db42-4.2.52_5
cvs checkout -P  ports/databases/db42

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: expat-2.0.1_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/textproc/expat2

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: gdbm-1.8.3_3
cvs checkout -P  ports/databases/gdbm

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: libiconv-1.13.1_1
cvs checkout -P  ports/converters/libiconv

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: libtool-2.2.10
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/libtool

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: m4-1.4.15,1
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/m4

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: pcre-8.11
cvs checkout -P  ports/devel/pcre

# apache-2.2.17_1 depend on port: perl-5.10.1_3
cvs checkout -P  ports/lang/perl5.10

##################################################
# Compile and install apache-2.2.17_1
( cd ports/www/apache22 && make all install clean )

[jhelfman@eggman /usr/ports/www/apache22]$ make all-depends-list
/usr/ports/lang/perl5.10
/usr/ports/devel/autoconf
/usr/ports/devel/libtool
/usr/ports/textproc/expat2
/usr/ports/devel/apr1
/usr/ports/devel/pcre
/usr/ports/converters/libiconv
/usr/ports/devel/m4
/usr/ports/misc/help2man
/usr/ports/devel/gmake
/usr/ports/devel/autoconf-wrapper
/usr/ports/lang/python26
/usr/ports/devel/automake
/usr/ports/databases/gdbm
/usr/ports/databases/db42
/usr/ports/devel/p5-Locale-gettext
/usr/ports/devel/gettext
/usr/ports/devel/automake-wrapper
[jhelfman@eggman /usr/ports/www/apache22]$ make run-depends-list
/usr/ports/converters/libiconv
/usr/ports/devel/apr1
/usr/ports/devel/pcre
/usr/ports/lang/perl5.10
/usr/ports/textproc/expat2
[jhelfman@eggman /usr/ports/www/apache22]$ 

-jgh
